seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between White Gums and Willowra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: White Gums vs Willowra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in White Gums and Willowra.
heading: White Gums vs Willowra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between White Gums, Northern Territory and Willowra, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Willowra has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to White Gums (29/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is White Gums or Willowra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: White Gums has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Willowra scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: White Gums scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Willowra scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in White Gums or Willowra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Willowra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
